rbaHistory.note: First cut since Nov 2020 — CPI back in 2-3% band
Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: ASX slides lower, oil jumps after Hormuz closure; Viva Energy, NAB slump
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket has made a rocky start to the week amid an escalation of tensions in the Middle East.

news.title: Hint of major changes to super laws
news.snippet: Federal Treasurer Jim Chalmers says the Albanese government will shortly reveal a new approach to a key part of the superannuation system.

news.title: Tech stocks soar but ASX 200 slides
news.snippet: Surging technology stocks have failed to lift the Australian sharemarket, as traders remain wary of Middle East peace talks.

news.title: Major stock update after Geelong refinery fire
news.snippet: The energy company that owns and operates the Geelong refinery which went up in flames has returned to the ASX after four days of suspended trading.

news.title: Golden Dragon drills for scale and strike in WA gold system
news.snippet: Golden Dragon Mining has restarted drilling in WA’s Murchison goldfields at Cue to test Behring Bore and target extension of shallow high-grade gold at Coodardy.

news.title: Fire-ravaged Geelong oil refinery charts path back to 90% output
news.snippet: The Geelong oil refinery expects to ramp up to near-maximum output “within weeks” following a major blaze that heightened fears about Australia’s fuel security.

news.title: Tim Tams and Oreos: The 12 grocery items Woolworths and ACCC will fight over in court
news.snippet: Supermarket executives will be in the witness stand this week as they prepare to challenge the consumer watchdog’s accusations of fake discounts.

news.title: The best midlife investment you can make
news.snippet: Don't leave it too late - making small changes now can dramatically boost your health span, says Money columnist Bec Wilson.

news.title: $1.6 billion bet raises huge suspicions
news.snippet: The financial world’s suspicions have been raised after yet another flurry of bets were placed minutes before a major Iran War announcement.

news.title: Key detail in $1000 tax write-off pledge
news.snippet: More than 6.2 million Australians eligible to claim a $1000 tax deduction without receipts will have to wait.

news.title: US-Israeli war against Iran means world has ‘permanently lost’ a chunk of daily oil supply
news.snippet: The fragility of the planet has been woefully exposed by warring governments this year, and now experts are saying it the effects will be permanent.

news.title: Wall Street is playing a very dangerous game with Trump
news.snippet: Wall Street is operating in a parallel universe to the one its peers are in as the war rages on. If these two worlds collide, the aftershocks could be violent.
